extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY attacked from early breakaway on final climb, took yellow jersey by 47 seconds over VINGEGAARD who counter-attacked without teammates while POGAČAR lost 1:40.
tactical_patterns: HINDLEY prioritized breakaway infiltration over waiting for team support, securing yellow through early positioning not pure climbing.
VINGEGAARD attacked solo without VISMA teammates to limit losses, valuing every second over waiting for organizational help.
VAN AERT and PEDERSEN contested intermediate sprint aggressively despite mountains ahead, signaling green jersey prioritization over GC support.
POGAČAR isolated with only YATES Adam for pacing, losing 1:40 when UAE train collapsed on final climb.

rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: converted breakaway gamble into yellow jersey, showing Tour GC ambitions beyond domestique role
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: solo chase without teammates netted 47s gap to yellow, demonstrating tactical discipline to bank time bonuses
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: dropped 1:40 with only YATES Adam for support, UAE mountain train already fractured stage 5
rider_signals.JAKOBSEN Fabio: negative: dropped before breakaway established, abandoned chase entirely signaling peak form issues
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: neutral: sprinted intermediate against PEDERSEN before mountains, splitting focus between green jersey and team duties
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: lost yellow jersey, fell to 1:34 deficit after pacing POGAČAR on final climb
